Tests bitwise NOT operation on a number in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that demonstrates the use of the bitwise NOT operator in JavaScript. It initializes a variable `a` with the numeric value `1` and then uses an assertion to check that applying the bitwise NOT operator to `a` results in `-2`. The expression `~a` inverts the bits of the number `1`, which in two's complement binary representation results in `-2`. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific bitwise operation and its result.
